claims.summary: The fixed projection basis and entropy vibrancy gate must remain deterministic and continuous.
claims.disposition: verify deterministic projection, checksum, repeatability, and smoothstep gate regressions

claims.summary: A near-zero raw projection column could silently create a dead semantic dimension and needs an initialization diagnostic.
claims.disposition: implement projection_basis_health_v1 with raw and normalized norms, threshold, column indexes, and no live write

claims.summary: Projection epoch storage must resolve independently of process working directory and fail deterministically.
claims.disposition: verify executable-relative runtime resolution and atomic epoch-file tests already in current source
